item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 011400Z AUTO 13004KT 090V170 9999 FEW034/// OVC098/// ///TCU 23/15 Q1021 TEMPO 4000 -TSRA SCT050CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 011100Z 0112/0212 18005KT 9999 BKN030 TEMPO 0112/0119 -SHRA SCT050TCU PROB40 TEMPO 0113/0117 21010G25KT 4000 -TSRA SCT050CB BECMG 0117/0119 12003KT PROB30 TEMPO 0201/0203 -SHRA SCT050TCU BECMG 0207/0209 25010KT PROB40 TEMPO 0208/0212 -SHRA FEW060TCU
